## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Zuplo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO efforts, and workflow processes.](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two calibration articles approved; aiming to upload by end of tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [10 new article proposals greenlit; production to start next week](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Backlink strategy involves internal network initially, with outbound acquisition in parallel](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [GitHub access granted; Jenn to begin content uploading process](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Adrian to provide list of content tags to incorporate into workflow](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Updates

  - [Two calibration articles approved and ready for upload](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [10 new article proposals accepted, production to begin next week](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Aim to generate articles in batches to ramp up content output](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Jenn demonstrated AirOps workflow for article creation, including AI-assisted processes and human oversight at each stage](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
  - [Adrian suggested incorporating code samples and images into articles where relevant](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### SEO and Backlink Strategy

  - [Initial focus on internal network for backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Jimmy working on outbound backlink acquisition in parallel](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Challenges with email warming and outreach due to recent changes in the field](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)
  - [Adrian emphasized importance of direct brand mentions for AI-driven SEO, not just backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Kyle to have Jimmy join next call to discuss backlink strategy in detail](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=794.0)

### Technical Integration

  - [Jenn received GitHub access and will begin content uploading process](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
  - [Adrian to provide instructions for adding "expert opinion" elements within articles](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Discussion on content tagging system for improved site structure and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Adrian to share full list of existing tags; team to incorporate tag generation into content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Brief discussion on potential collaboration with Scrunch AI (Adrian to follow up later in the week)](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
  - [Team members shared personal anecdotes about recent illnesses and COVID experiences](https://fathom.video/share/uU5QnY6KdSHbqa2mptotaCEEBMs_zb59?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
